dailyNews.description: Adam Carolla defends Trump's Iran strike decision against Joe Rogan's criticism, arguing the threat has been clearly defined through nuclear concerns and policy.

dailyNews.title: Former Southern Baptist president enters hospice care at 68
dailyNews.description: Former Southern Baptist Convention President Steve Gaines, who previously pastored at Bellevue Baptist Church, has entered hospice care.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns NATO of 'very bad' future if allies don't help secure Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump warned NATO allies who fail to help defend the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions over military burden-sharing responsibilities.

dailyNews.title: Iran war keeps Strait of Hormuz paralyzed and oil prices over $100
dailyNews.description: Iran war could escalate further as Trump threatens to hit key oil infrastructure if Tehran doesn't drop its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Democratic, Republican strategists react to Trump's handling of Iran war, rising prices
dailyNews.description: Americans remain concerned about rising prices and conflict abroad as the Iran war enters its third week. Political strategists Kevin Sheridan and Hyma Moore join CBS News with their take on the latest moves by the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Latest news on Iran war as Trump faces anger over oil prices, Strait of Hormuz ships attacked
dailyNews.description: President Trump is trying to soothe concerns over rising oil and gas prices. This comes as he calls on allies to help protect ships on the Strait of Hormuz from Iranian attacks. CBS News' Charlie D'Agata and Imtiaz Tyab report.

dailyNews.title: U.S. is allowing Iranian oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz, says Bessent
dailyNews.description: The White House believes tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will increase before Navy escorts are deployed, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices fall as Trump pressures allies to help protect tankers in Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: The U.S. strikes on Kharg Island and Trump's threat to hit Iran's oil infrastructure mark a major escalation in the war, according to JPMorgan.

dailyNews.title: Trump-Xi China summit may be delayed if Trump wants to stay in Washington for Iran war: Bessent
dailyNews.description: Trump's visit, scheduled for March 31-April 2, would be the first for a U.S. president since he went to the country in 2017.

dailyNews.title: Democrats blast FCC Chair Carr's broadcast license threats as anti-First Amendment, 'totalitarian'
dailyNews.description: Carr on Saturday blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

dailyNews.title: US Jet Fighters Target Iran’s Kharg Island Oil Hub
dailyNews.description: Iran launched new attacks on Monday striking a fuel depot at Dubai’s airport and unleashing cluster bombs on Tel Aviv. Meanwhile, the Pentagon said it destroyed Kharg Island’s defenses, just off the Iranian coast, which produces 90% of Iran’s oil. President Donald Trump said he could go further and target the oil facilities themselves. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.
